overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked elevated pedestrian walkway in Night City. The scene features heavy neon lighting from corporate advertisements, reflective wet surfaces, and transitions from an open-air balcony overlooking the street to a covered interior glass walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railing overlooking city street

events.description: camera turns left from overlooking the street to following the curved walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated glass walkway overlooking the rainy street below, turning left to follow the curved path

entered.detail: large red neon sign for Fuyutsuki Electronics on building facade across the street
transparent glass safety railing along the walkway edge overlooking the street
multi-lane city street visible through the rain below the elevated walkway
illuminated corporate signage for Kendachi on adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night atop an elevated pedestrian walkway with a glass railing overlooking a neon-lit city street. The camera walks forward and turns left, revealing the Fuyutsuki Electronics sign and Kendachi corporate signage across the street while rain falls heavily.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor café lounge with purple neon umbrellas and vending machines

events.description: entering the outdoor seating area with large purple umbrellas and neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through an outdoor lounge area with distinctive purple neon-lit umbrellas, passing vending machines and seating pods

notable_agents.action: standing at a red vending machine interacting with the digital interface

entered.detail: large outdoor umbrellas with purple neon lighting underneath providing shelter from rain
red automated food and drink vending kiosks with illuminated displays
round cushioned seating pods with metallic frames arranged under umbrellas

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered outdoor lounge area featuring distinctive purple neon-lit umbrellas sheltering round seating pods. Red vending machines line the left side while pedestrians stand about, and the Fuyutsuki Electronics sign remains visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with digital billboards and concrete stairs

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide concrete staircase leading to the upper level entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across an open plaza with benches and large advertisements, then ascending a wide concrete staircase toward the building entrance

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs while wearing a yellow jacket and dark pants

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward to the building entrance
illuminated advertisement screen showing Worry-free travel messaging and vehicle imagery
metal and wood benches for seating arranged along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the lounge area, the scene opens into a plaza with large digital billboards and benches. The camera approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase while an NPC descends in the opposite direction. The Fuyutsuki Electronics sign looms ahead as the camera climbs toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered glass walkway with neon frames and rain visible on ceiling

events.description: entering the covered interior walkway with glass ceiling showing rain falling above

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic covered walkway with glass ceiling, observing the rain falling overhead while neon lights reflect off the wet marble floor

entered.detail: transparent glass roof showing heavy rain falling from the night sky above
cyan neon light strips framing the walkway entrance and structural columns
large rectangular planters with trees and greenery lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: Entering the building, the scene becomes a covered walkway with a glass ceiling revealing the pouring rain above. Cyan neon light frames illuminate the corridor while reflecting off the wet marble floor. Large planters with trees line the path as the camera continues through this sheltered interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a rain-soaked elevated walkway that transitions from an open city overlook into a sheltered corporate plaza. It begins atop a pedestrian bridge with a glass railing, moving forward and turning left to reveal the glowing Fuyutsuki Electronics and Kendachi corporate signage through a heavy downpour. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a semi-covered outdoor lounge characterized by purple neon-lit umbrellas, round seating pods, and red vending machines. The scene then opens into a wider plaza filled with large digital billboards and benches before the camera begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. The movement concludes as the camera climbs toward the entrance of the looming Fuyutsuki Electronics building, passing a descending pedestrian along the way.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an open-air environment transitions into a sheltered, neon-lit interior corridor. It begins by entering a building, where the open sky is replaced by a glass ceiling that reveals the pouring rain above. As the camera advances, the atmosphere shifts toward a structured walkway defined by cyan neon frames that cast vibrant reflections across a wet marble floor. The scene then flows past large planters with trees lining the path before continuing deeper into the sheltered interior space.
